# Header Briefing Skill

> A skill for agentic coding tools that fetches intelligence briefings from [Header](https://joinheader.com) and surfaces recommendations relevant to the current project. Built for [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code) but works in any agent with shell access (Cursor, Aider, OpenAI Codex CLI, Goose). Public briefings work with no authentication; API-key workflows enable custom project-specific topics.

Header is a continuous-learning platform that synthesizes curated RSS, YouTube, newsletter, and Reddit sources into focused briefings — turning information into behavior change rather than aggregating more content. Core concepts: **Topics** group sources and goals, **Goals** define what to learn, **Source Groups** are collections of content feeds, and **Briefings** are the synthesized digests produced by analyzing recent content against a goal.

This skill is a small, declarative folder: `SKILL.md` drives the agent to call Header's public API via `curl`, read the current workspace, and propose actionable changes; `bin/header-config` persists configuration under `~/.header/`; `install.sh` installs the folder into an agent's skills directory. No runtime, no build step, no dependencies beyond `bash` and `curl`.

## Skill files

- [header-briefing/SKILL.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Header-inc/Header-skill/main/header-briefing/SKILL.md): The skill definition. Contains the run-first preamble, the default agentic-coding briefing flow, the first-run onboarding (welcome, language preference, signup funnel), public topic browsing, the custom-briefing (API key) workflow, and the full response-field reference.
- [header-briefing/bin/header-config](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Header-inc/Header-skill/main/header-briefing/bin/header-config): Reads/writes the persisted config at `~/.header/config` (get/set/list/defaults). Plain bash.
- [header-briefing/bin/header-repo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Header-inc/Header-skill/main/header-briefing/bin/header-repo): Remembers which custom topic a repository uses (bind/get/clear/list/seen), so new sessions in that repo reuse it. Local registry at `~/.header/repos.jsonl`, keyed by git remote (path fallback). Plain bash.
- [header-briefing/bin/header-audit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Header-inc/Header-skill/main/header-briefing/bin/header-audit): BETA. Local, read-only scan behind the `audit` mode — agent-harness/prompt-config debt + Bash-tool security posture (harness) and dependency/supply-chain posture (deps), plus the recommended npm/pip install-cooldown snippets (gate). Plain bash; nothing leaves the machine.
- [header-briefing/VERSION](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Header-inc/Header-skill/main/header-briefing/VERSION): The skill version (mirrors the `SKILL.md` frontmatter `version:`).
- [install.sh](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Header-inc/Header-skill/main/install.sh): One-command installer — copies the `header-briefing/` folder into the agent's skills directory.
- [README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Header-inc/Header-skill/main/README.md): Installation, usage, and configuration.
- [LICENSE](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Header-inc/Header-skill/main/LICENSE): MIT.

## Header API endpoints used by this skill

- `GET https://joinheader.com/api/v2/topics/public/{topic_id}`: Public topic metadata, including `latest_briefing.id`. Default topic is the "Self Improving Agent" briefing at `1991163f-be9c-4df2-a33c-046a4d1357e1`.
- `GET https://joinheader.com/api/v2/public/briefings/{briefing_id}`: Full briefing (summary, key_developments, source_articles). No auth required. JSON only — `Accept: text/markdown` is not honored on this endpoint.
- `GET https://joinheader.com/api/v2/topics/public/catalog`: Browse all public topics.
- `POST https://joinheader.com/api/v2/topics/`: Create a custom topic (requires `Authorization: Bearer $HEADER_API_KEY`). Default source group `64981a34-3b8b-4064-a391-22f4534c229b` covers AI agent frameworks, MCP, and coding tools.
- `POST https://joinheader.com/api/v2/goals/{goal_id}/briefings`: Trigger a new briefing for an existing goal (requires API key).
- `GET https://joinheader.com/api/v2/briefings/{briefing_id}`: Check status of a private briefing (`IN_PROGRESS`, `COMPLETED`, `FAILED`). Honors `Accept: text/markdown` for a pre-rendered markdown response.
- `PUT https://joinheader.com/api/v2/goals/{goal_id}`: Update goal description, keywords, `memory_enabled` (kicks off async Forge provisioning; poll `memory_state` until `enabled`/`error`), or scheduling (`schedule_enabled`, `schedule_frequency_days` for 3/7/14/30-day auto-regeneration). `GET` returns `last_briefing_at` and `next_scheduled_generation`.
- `GET https://joinheader.com/api/v2/topics/dashboard?since=<iso8601>`: Agent-shaped dashboard — returns topics with status changes since the timestamp, plus a server-computed `next_action` enum (`briefing_ready` / `briefing_failed` / `briefing_in_progress` / `nothing`) for cron / scheduled runs.

## Header product docs

- [Header docs home](https://joinheader.com/docs): Overview of the service, core concepts, and API.
- [Header dashboard](https://joinheader.com): Sign up, manage topics, and create API keys (`Settings > API Keys`, scope `read`).

## Optional

- [Claude Code skills documentation](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code/skills): How skills are loaded and invoked.
- [llms.txt specification](https://llmstxt.org): The format this file follows.
